message:
fix(supply_chain): deterministic ISO8601 fallback + NaN-safe weight sorting

Concurrent agent fixes for two edge case categories:

Timestamp formatting (category_shift.rs, trust_card.rs):
- Changed chrono conversion failure fallback from "{secs}Z" (invalid ISO8601)
  to "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z" (valid epoch), ensuring all timestamps parse as
  valid RFC3339 regardless of input value
- Added tests: format_iso_timestamp_produces_valid_iso8601,
  format_iso_timestamp_fallback_is_valid_iso8601,
  timestamp_from_secs_produces_valid_iso8601,
  timestamp_from_secs_fallback_is_valid_iso8601

Federation weight sorting (atc_participation_weighting.rs):
- Added .unwrap_or(std::cmp::Ordering::Equal) fallback for NaN values in
  float comparison during ATC participation weight sorting, preventing
  panic on partial_cmp failure

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
